creator: rjk@wintek.com
text:
That must have been it. I cut-n-pasted from UPDATING, and everything (except
dconf) seemed to work. I just now ran

pkg delete -f docbook\*

and ran portmaster to upgrade dconf, and it worked.

Sorry for the noise.
